rawContent:
{
  "title": "Tiny Test Avatar",
  "summary": "A compact and friendly tiny avatar with a playful expression.",
  "palette": "blue",
  "scene": null,
  "body": "body_blob",
  "head": "head_round",
  "eyes": "eyes_googly",
  "mouth": "mouth_smile",
  "primitives": [],
  "layers": [
    {
      "shape": "mascotBody",
      "anchor": "free",
      "x": 0,
      "y": 0,
      "scale": [0.3, 0.3],
      "rotate": 0,
      "material": "glossyBlue",
      "role": "part",
      "z": 2,
      "attach": {
        "socket": "body.center"
      }
    },
    {
      "shape": "mascotHead",
      "anchor": "free",
      "x": 0,
      "y": 30,
      "scale": [0.4, 0.4],
      "rotate": 0,
      "material": "glossyBlue",
      "role": "part",
      "z": 8,
      "attach": {
        "socket": "head.center"
      }
    },
    {
      "shape": "cuteEye",
      "anchor": "free",
      "x": -10,
      "y": 10,
      "scale": [0.1, 0.1],
      "rotate": 0,
      "material": "softWhite",
      "role": "eye",
      "z": 20,
      "attach": {
        "socket": "head.leftEye"
      }
    },
    {
      "shape": "cuteEye",
      "anchor": "free",
      "x": 10,
      "y": 10,
      "scale": [0.1, 0.1],
      "rotate": 0,
      "material": "softWhite",
      "role": "eye",
      "z": 20,
      "attach": {
        "socket": "head.rightEye"
      }
    },
    {
      "shape": "mouthSmile",
      "anchor": "free",
      "x": 0,
      "y": 20,
      "scale": [0.2, 0.1],
      "rotate": 0,
      "material": "charcoalRubber",
      "role": "mouth",
      "z": 31,
      "attach": {
        "socket": "head.mouth"
      }
    }
  ]
}
